word: G4272 - προδίδωμι - prodídōmi - prod-id'-o-mee - First give

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προδίδωμι

- Transliteration: Prodidomi

- Phonetic: prod-id'-o-mee

- Definition:

1. to give before, give first

2. to betray

- Origin: from G4253 and G1325

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G1325; to give before the other party has given: - first give.
